title: RAWG Video Games Scraper
description: Scrape video game data from RAWG. Provide a Start URL (e.g. https://rawg.io/games?search=zelda) or a Keyword. No API key required.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: A RAWG search URL to scrape, e.g. https://rawg.io/games?search=zelda. If provided, this takes priority over Keyword.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword to find games, e.g. 'grand theft auto', 'FIFA', 'action RPG'. Used when no Start URL is provided.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of results
results_wanted.description: The maximum number of games to collect.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: Safety cap on the number of API pages to fetch (20 games per page).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Optional — works without proxy in most cases.
